carry_verdict.headline_en: MARGINAL — small loss of 0.45% per year
carry_verdict.headline_zh: 边缘亏损 — 对冲后亏 0.45%/年
chain: 借入 CNY · CNH HIBOR 1 年
carry_verdict.reasoning_en: Result sits inside the typical bid-offer / financing-spread band. Execution slippage will likely consume any apparent edge — treat as no-go for retail-sized positions.
carry_verdict.reasoning_zh: 结果落在常见的买卖价差与融资点差带内。下单滑点很可能吃掉这点收益 ——零售规模下视同不可做。

policy_stance.reading_en: None of the three defence levers is active. PBOC is letting market dynamics run; the current spot level appears to be inside the policy tolerance band.
policy_stance.reading_zh: 三条防御工具都没有出手。央行让市场自己跑，当前汇率水平在政策容忍区间之内。
